name: Everlight Chemical Industrial Corporation
summary: Everlight Chemical Industrial Corporation produces and sells chemical products in Taiwan, rest of Asia, the Americas, Europe, and internationally. The company offers dyes for use in textile, leather, ink jet printing, digital textile printing, anodized aluminum, paper, and solar energy applications; specialty chemicals that are used in coatings, adhesives, plastics, polyurethanes, elastomers, and cosmetics; toners, cartridges, and carriers and developers for printers and ceramic ware; and electronic chemicals for use in yellow lithography, rinsing imaging, and substrate flattening process, as well as semiconductor and substrate surface cleaning, electroplating, surface coating, and electronic assembly applications. It also provides prostaglandin and other material medicines; and technical consulting services. Everlight Chemical Industrial Corporation was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
